summary: NVIDIA open-sources Nemotron-Labs DLM, a family of diffusion language models for faster inference.
Tencent open-sources TencentDB Agent Memory, a 4-tier local memory pipeline for AI agents
OpenClaw releases version 2026.5.22, with performance improvements and new features for the AI assistant
Google AI Studio now allows anyone to build Android apps with AI, generating native apps from simple prompts
xAI launches Grok Build, a new AI coding tool to compete with Claude Code and Codex
OpenAI releases gpt-oss-safeguard, a set of open-weight reasoning models for custom AI safety rules
Google launches Gemini Spark, a 24/7 AI agent that assists with tasks across Gmail, Docs, and third-party apps
Meta launches Forum, a Reddit-style app that blends Facebook Groups with AI-powered discussions
Alibaba's Qwen team releases Qwen3.7-Max, a new AI model for autonomous tasks, available through an API.
Cohere open-sources Command A+, a 218B MoE model for enterprise agents.
Pydantic AI V2 Beta 3 is released, adding new features and improvements to the AI agent framework
Google launches Gemini Omni, a create-anything AI model for generating and editing clips from mixed inputs
Apertus is a fully open, transparent, multilingual language model available for developers and organizations
Microsoft releases Fara1.5, a family of browser computer-use agents in 4B, 9B, and 27B sizes
Thinking Machines reveals TML-Interaction-Small, a new multimodal AI model for concurrent audio, video, and text input and output.
Cursor releases Composer 2.5, a new coding agent model that scores 63 on the Coding Agent Index.
Oracle AI Database 26ai is now generally available, introducing native vector search and AI-driven query optimization
Vercel AI releases @ai-sdk/google-vertex@4.0.136, with updated dependencies and improvements
OpenMythos is an open-source reconstruction of Claude Mythos, challenging the assumption that more parameters produce more capable models
MiniMax introduces MiniMax Speech 02, a new TTS system for voice personalization and multilingual support.
Paradigm open-sources Centaur, a self-hosted runtime for multiplayer, secure AI agents
JetBrains releases Koog 1.0.0, a JVM framework for building predictable, fault-tolerant, and enterprise-ready AI agents
Turbovec is a new open-source library for vector search, reducing memory consumption by 87%
Yohei Nakajima open-sources ActiveGraph Runtime, a reactive graph runtime for long-running AI agents
Figma releases a design agent built for Figma, allowing users to work with an agent directly on the canvas
Google Cloud releases GKE Agent Sandbox, a secure compute environment for autonomous agents
DeepSeek-V3 is a 671B parameter Mixture-of-Experts language model that can be run locally
Cohere releases Command A+, a 218B sparse Mixture-of-Experts language model, as open-source software
Google introduces Gemini 3.5, a new family of models combining frontier intelligence with action, available to billions globally.
Google introduces Managed Agents in the Gemini API, allowing for easy deployment of AI agents in a secure cloud sandbox
Docker releases Gordon, an AI agent for container workflows, to help with debugging and troubleshooting
OpenJarvis v1.0.0 is released, a personal AI framework with efficiency and on-device learning capabilities
IBM releases Granite Embedding Multilingual R2, a new multilingual embedding model with 32K context and a compact 97M retrieval model.
A new version of SSE Retrieval MRL is released, with improved performance and regularization of representation space.
Elastic launches a new multimodal AI embedding model family, jina-embeddings-v5-omni, for text, images, video, and audio
